title: 3D MedPack Totem
description: A custom 3D MedPack Totem of undying inluding a custom 3D-Model and Texture
body:
# Custom MedPack Totem 

Transform your Minecraft experience with this unique resource pack, which replaces the standard Totem of Undying with a sleek MedPack design! Perfect for survival and adventure-themed worlds, this custom MedPack adds a fresh visual element to your gameplay.

## 🛠 Features:

MedPack Design: The Totem of Undying is now represented as a modern MedPack.
Compatibility: Works with all Minecraft versions supporting resource packs ~~~~with 3d-models (1.13+)..
Modes: Functional in both survival and creative modes.
Equip your MedPack and stay prepared for any challenge that comes your way!

## 👁 Preview:

_Check out how the MedPack Totem looks in-game with this preview image._
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZqBzr1Of/images/a3775654af0831f21f27d817893ee6eae96d9da9_350.webp)

Equip your MedPack and stay prepared for any challenge that comes your way!
